name: Product Card
description: A responsive, catalog-backed card for one selected product with configurable imagery, fields, actions and layout.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Product Card
attribute_definition_groups.description: A responsive, catalog-backed card for one selected product with configurable imagery, fields, actions and layout.

attribute_definitions.name: Product
attribute_definitions.description: Search for and select the catalog product displayed by this card.

attribute_definitions.name: Layout
attribute_definitions.description: Auto switches from vertical to horizontal based on the card container width.

attribute_definitions.name: Catalog image type
attribute_definitions.description: Catalog view type used as the card image.

attribute_definitions.name: Image ratio
attribute_definitions.description: Image frame ratio. Auto uses the storefront product-tile configuration.

attribute_definitions.name: Image fit
attribute_definitions.description: How the product image fits inside its responsive frame.

attribute_definitions.name: Show badges
attribute_definitions.description: Shows product badges such as new or sale.

attribute_definitions.name: Show wishlist action
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the action used to add the product to a wishlist.

attribute_definitions.name: Show quick add
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the quick-add action when the shopper interacts with the card.

attribute_definitions.name: Show color swatches
attribute_definitions.description: Shows color variations using swatch images when available.

attribute_definitions.name: Show brand
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the configured product or storefront brand.

attribute_definitions.name: Show category
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the product primary category when it is available.

attribute_definitions.name: Show product name
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the product name and PDP link.

attribute_definitions.name: Show SKU
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the product identifier.

attribute_definitions.name: Show rating
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the rating surface supplied by the host storefront.

attribute_definitions.name: Show price
attribute_definitions.description: Shows current and previous prices when available.

attribute_definitions.name: Show promotions
attribute_definitions.description: Shows promotional messages associated with the price.

attribute_definitions.name: Maximum swatches
attribute_definitions.description: Maximum number of visible color swatches (between 1 and 12).

attribute_definitions.name: Additional attributes
attribute_definitions.description: Up to 5 custom attributes separated by lines or commas. Use material|Material or season=Season. The c_ prefix is optional.

attribute_definitions.name: Border radius
attribute_definitions.description: Corner roundness of the product card.

attribute_definitions.name: Box shadow
attribute_definitions.description: Token-based elevation applied to the product card.

attribute_definitions.name: Hover effect
attribute_definitions.description: Optional motion-safe interaction applied by the shared product tile.
